title: Implement manager portfolio backend filters and pagination metadata
description: Enhance manager portfolio endpoint to support deterministic server-side status/city filters and pagination metadata needed by native manager list UX.
acceptance_criteria: Portfolio endpoint accepts additive status and city filters together with search/page/per_page
Response meta includes page, per_page, total, total_pages, has_next_page, and source
Property API tests cover filter combinations, pagination boundaries, and unauthorized/forbidden guardrails
